productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this leather shoe from red tape. The full grain leather lends it a natural colour finish that adds to your look an immense style quotient.UpperFull-grain leather upper in natural colour for absolute comfort, durability and styleLeather overlays for added shoe structure and styleFabric inner lining with a padded collar and tongue for ultimate breathabilityLace-up system for a snug, customised FitWide mouth for ease of wearMidsoleFabric footbed for sweat-free, cushioned comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with strategically placed multi-directional lugs on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction on various terrainShoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to maintain shoe shineDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
